## Discussion

When this flag is used, if code refers to a single architecture of a universal binary, return a [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecStaticCode] object that refers to the entire universal code with all its architectures. By default, the returned static reference identifies only the actual architecture of the running program.

# kSecCSUseAllArchitectures

**Global Variable**

Flag for requesting all architectures.

## Declaration

```swift
var kSecCSUseAllArchitectures: UInt32 { get }
```

## Discussion

When this flag is used, if code refers to a single architecture of a universal binary, return a [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecStaticCode] object that refers to the entire universal code with all its architectures. By default, the returned static reference identifies only the actual architecture of the running program.
title: kSecCSUseAllArchitectures
